message:
test(connectors): make introspect tests resilient to operation count changes

Refactor 11 connector introspect tests from asserting exact connector_id
values and operation counts to validating operations array structure
(non-empty, entries have id and summary strings). Prevents test breakage
when connectors add or remove operations over time.

Affected connectors: amplitude, cron, evernote, logseq, n8n, retool,
roam, semanticscholar, spotify, webhook-receiver, zapier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
